parameters.content:
## QA2-R02v2 — weclapp Price SalesChannel Sync (Rebuilt)

Rebuild of LIVE-weclapp-Price-SalesChannel-Sync using article.updatePrices
as a first-class weclapp node operation (no httpRequest fallback).

Changes vs LIVE:
- GET salesChannels and GET articles use weclapp node (customApiCall)
- PUT prices uses weclapp node (article → updatePrices)
- Code node outputs one item per (articleId, channel) instead of full PUT body
- dryRun=true in Constants for safe QA execution (gates actual PUT)

Credential: weclapp testhandel (testhandel.weclapp.com)
Branch: qa2/r02-price-sync
